_doc: Example local override. Copy to access-permissions.local.json (gitignored) and customize. Local entries are deep-merged over the public defaults — only specify what differs. Document each enabled capability with a rationale that references the private approval record.

ai_providers._doc: Example: enable Gemini locally after institutional review.

gemini.rationale: Locally approved on YYYY-MM-DD; see docs/APPROVAL.private.md ticket #XXXXX. Free tier API key, contract conditions reviewed.

host_ai_operations._doc: Example: extend the email_residual_classifier scope or add a new authorized host-AI operation. Each new entry must be documented with rationale and have institutional review.

data_sources._doc: Example: enable IMAP for a specific approved account, or unlock additional MS365 operations (e.g., write_calendar without per-event approval). Document the rationale.

ms365.rationale_local_override: Calendar writes pre-approved for personal-productivity scope; see docs/APPROVAL.private.md.

channels._doc: Example: enable WhatsApp as an additional self-only channel for personal mobile access.

whatsapp.rationale: Personal WhatsApp bot for mobile access to own assistant. Sender allowlist enforces single-user binding.

private_approval._doc: These environment-variable hints tell the policy loader where to read your private approval profile. Set them in .env (gitignored) — never commit real values.
